pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin source and target to Java 11 to ensure compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code will not compile or will produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 11 if source/target remain at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.annotation-api dependency to replace modules removed from JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime for javax.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @Resource) which were removed from the JDK in version 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Framework from 4.x to 5.x to support Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring 4.x does not support Java 11; using it results in runtime errors or compilation failures due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate from 5.1 to 5.6 to support Java 11 and newer JPA specifications.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Hibernate versions may have compatibility issues with Java 11 or newer JPA APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson Databind to a version compatible with Java 11 and Spring 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jackson versions may have compatibility issues with Java 11 or newer Spring versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace log4j 1.2 with Log4j 2 and SLF4J to align with modern logging standards and Java 11 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Log4j 1.2 is deprecated and may have compatibility issues with Java 11; migration to Log4j 2 is standard practice.
